subject: [PATCH v3 04/20] xfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the XFS iomap operations to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using macros that wrap the iomap_iter_next() helper. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is a conversion from the previous ->iomap_begin method. The patch affects several files in the xfs filesystem code, including xfs_file.c and xfs_iomap.c.
